ValidationRule.description: Sprint cannot be put On Hold if any of its stories are currently in SIT, QA, or UAT environments. Stories in active testing must be resolved first.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "On Hold"), ISCHANGED(Status__c), EXISTS( SELECT Id FROM User_Story__c WHERE Sprint__c = Id AND Status__c IN ('Sent to SIT', 'Successfully Deployed to SIT', 'Sent to QA', 'Sent to UAT', 'Sent to Prod') ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Sprint cannot be put On Hold while stories are actively in SIT, QA, UAT, or Prod. Please complete or reassign those stories first.
